title: MRD Geometry Transition Model v0

allowed_transition_types.label: coverage status movement
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: A source-specific extraction adds a second public source for a mechanism bucket.
allowed_transition_types.required_boundary: Artifact coverage only; not evidence strength or clinical readiness.

allowed_transition_types.label: weaken edge
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: A new source introduces method, cohort, timing, or source-type tension that reduces comparability.
allowed_transition_types.required_boundary: Weakening is structural and cannot become clinical negative evidence.

allowed_transition_types.label: split node
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: A bucket contains distinguishable source frames that should not be represented as one state.
allowed_transition_types.required_boundary: Splitting improves source traceability and does not rank branches.

allowed_transition_types.label: merge linked context
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: Independent sources align method, context, and uncertainty enough to share a source-bounded context.
allowed_transition_types.required_boundary: Merge is structural context linking only, not claim strengthening.

allowed_transition_types.label: block claim
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: An output tries to infer clinical advice, ranking, prognosis, validation, or cure.

allowed_transition_types.label: retain source-bounded state
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: Evidence supports the current structure but not a stronger movement.

allowed_transition_types.label: route to source extraction
allowed_transition_types.allowed_when: A question lacks source-specific extraction, aligned method context, or contradiction review.
allowed_transition_types.required_boundary: Routes work to source extraction instead of inference.

transition_rules.if_source_condition: A mechanism bucket has one extraction record and a new accepted extraction adds a second source-specific signal.
required_checks: coverage wording says artifact coverage only

transition_rules.if_source_condition: A new source supports a bucket but conflicts by assay, platform, specimen, disease timing, therapy exposure, source type, or cohort frame.
A bucket contains multiple distinguishable state types or support contexts.
Any output field contains diagnosis, prognosis, MRD interpretation, monitoring, treatment, trial, target, ranking, validation, or cure content.
required_checks: route back to research artifact boundary
keep blocked_output_manifest populated with blocked values

transition_rules.if_source_condition: A hypothesis lacks aligned source extraction, method context, or contradiction review.

forbidden_transitions: source signal to patient-specific MRD interpretation

review_notes: Created for Phase 6 falsification and hypothesis generation.
Forbidden transitions explicitly block clinical, ranking, and cure outputs.
